pi_items.source: Hardcoded in setup_task.sh as PROJECT_DIR and used to create the project files.
Counted 25 test functions created within setup_task.sh across four test files.
Confirmed in verifier.py, which calculates the score and sets 'passed = score >= 60'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying Python files within the project at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/circuit_analyzer. The environment dynamically generates exactly 25 test functions across four test files. The verifier confirms a pass threshold of 60 points out of a possible 100 based on test completion.
